results.rendered_html:
utka (von ud)
1〉 adj. f. ā aufgeregt aus Verlangen nach Etwas, sich sehnend, sehnsüchtig  P. 5,2,80 .  AK. 3,1,8 .  H. 436 . tenāhamutkā tvāṃ draṣṭumāgatā  KATHĀS. 13,121 . 21,126 . adrisutāsamāgamotkaḥ  KUMĀRAS. 6,95 .  MEGH. 11 .  KATHĀS. 3,68 . 5,141 . begierig zu, mit dem inf.  ŚIŚUP. 4,18 .
— 2〉 subst. Sehnsucht: sotka sehnsüchtig  KATHĀS. 21,62 . ciradarśanasotkayā dṛṣṭyā 26,271 . sotkasthitapriyām 25,269 .

results.rendered_html:
utka a. [ud-svārthe kan; utkaḥ = u. tkaṃṭhitaḥ; utka unmanāḥ  P. V. 2. 80   Sk. ]
1 Desirous of, longing for, anxiously wishing for (in comp.); adrisutāsamāgamotkaḥ  Ku. 6. 95 ; mānasotkāḥ  Me. 11 ; sometimes with an inf.;  Śi. 4. 18. 
2 Regretting, sad, sorrowful.
3 Absent-minded.
— tkaḥ
1 Desire.
2 Opportunity.
